feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Bruno Guimaraes raconte son échange houleux avec Cristiano Ronaldo - Foot - C1 - OL

link.title: Bruno Guimaraes raconte son échange houleux avec Cristiano Ronaldo - Foot - C1 - OL

entry.content: VIDÉO FOOTBALL - Arrivé cet hiver en provenance de l’Athletico Paranaense, l’international Espoirs brésilien Bruno Guimarães s’est immédiatement imposé dans l’entrejeu de l’Olympique Lyonnais. Pour sa deuxième rencontre sous ses nouvelles couleurs, il affrontait et battait la Juventus Turin en 8es de finale aller de la Ligue des champions (1-0). Alors que se profile le match retour, l’Auriverde évoque une anecdote avec Cristiano Ronaldo et se veut confiant pour la suite de la compétition.
entry.summary: VIDÉO FOOTBALL - Arrivé cet hiver en provenance de l’Athletico Paranaense, l’international Espoirs brésilien Bruno Guimarães s’est immédiatement imposé dans l’entrejeu de l’Olympique Lyonnais. Pour sa deuxième rencontre sous ses nouvelles couleurs, il affrontait et battait la Juventus Turin en 8es de finale aller de la Ligue des champions (1-0). Alors que se profile le match retour, l’Auriverde évoque une anecdote avec Cristiano Ronaldo et se veut confiant pour la suite de la compétition.

link.title: Moon - Lanzamiento en España

entry.title: Kristal Silva ya superó la Covid-19 y regresó al foro de VLA

link.title: Kristal Silva ya superó la Covid-19 y regresó al foro de VLA

entry.content:
Eduardo Videgaray responde a tuit de Roberto Palazuelos
Maripily Rivera revela que Ferka y Christian Estrada se habrían reconciliado
Omar Chaparro vendió la lujosa residencia donde vivía en EUA
Kristal Silva ya superó la Covid-19 y regresó al foro de VLA

entry.title: Guy Leaves car Without Pulling Handbrakes

link.title: Guy Leaves car Without Pulling Handbrakes

entry.content: This guy got out of his car at the traffic signal. He only realized that his ride was moving when cars surrounding his started honking. When he figured that he had forgotten to pull the handbrake, he quickly ran towards the car and tried to make it stop.
entry.summary: This guy got out of his car at the traffic signal. He only realized that his ride was moving when cars surrounding his started honking. When he figured that he had forgotten to pull the handbrake, he quickly ran towards the car and tried to make it stop.

entry.title: Le chef-d’oeuvre de Mbappé face à Lyon - Foot - Coupe

link.title: Le chef-d’oeuvre de Mbappé face à Lyon - Foot - Coupe

entry.content: Le PSG affronte l’OL vendredi dans le cadre de la finale de Coupe de la Ligue. Il y a quasiment cinq mois, les deux équipes s’affrontaient déjà en demi-finales de la Coupe de France, avec un but d’anthologie de Kylian Mbappé.
entry.summary: Le PSG affronte l’OL vendredi dans le cadre de la finale de Coupe de la Ligue. Il y a quasiment cinq mois, les deux équipes s’affrontaient déjà en demi-finales de la Coupe de France, avec un but d’anthologie de Kylian Mbappé.

entry.content:

WTT 2020: What A Season!
WTT 2020: What A Season!
WTT 2020: What A Season!

entry.title: Krissan Barreto Claims Rhea Didn’t Even Let Sushant Talk To His Family

link.title: Krissan Barreto Claims Rhea Didn’t Even Let Sushant Talk To His Family

entry.content: The cause-related to Sushant Singh Rajput’s death is taking major twist every single day. In the latest development, Sushant’s father has filed a complaint against Rhea Chakraborty for using actors money and fame for her betterment, even Bihar police are involved in the investigation now. Many of the Sushant’s old friends and house help are coming forward and disclosed some shocking details. Now, Ace of Space fame Krissan Barreto who was Sushant’s good friend till last year, claims that the late actor disconnected with everyone, since the dey Rhea came into his life, sharing the details, Krissan wrote, "After he started dating this female he was not allowed to be in touch with any of us!! All of his friends!! His numbers were changed and we all know that! We all tried reaching him but we could not! The statement from his dad says she didn’t even let him talk to his family! @rhea_chakraborty yes the truth will be out we will make sure! Satyamev jayate back at you!" The ‘Kaisi Yeh Yaariaan’ actress said that she is putting an official statement in case someone tries to harm her. She added that she would never kill herself.
entry.summary: The cause-related to Sushant Singh Rajput’s death is taking major twist every single day. In the latest development, Sushant’s father has filed a complaint against Rhea Chakraborty for using actors money and fame for her betterment, even Bihar police are involved in the investigation now. Many of the Sushant’s old friends and house help are coming forward and disclosed some shocking details. Now, Ace of Space fame Krissan Barreto who was Sushant’s good friend till last year, claims that the late actor disconnected with everyone, since the dey Rhea came into his life, sharing the details, Krissan wrote, "After he started dating this female he was not allowed to be in touch with any of us!! All of his friends!! His numbers were changed and we all know that! We all tried reaching him but we could not! The statement from his dad says she didn’t even let him talk to his family! @rhea_chakraborty yes the truth will be out we will make sure! Satyamev jayate back at you!" The ‘Kaisi Yeh Yaariaan’ actress said that she is putting an official statement in case someone tries to harm her. She added that she would never kill herself.

entry.title: Planète Mars : un premier aller-retour

link.title: Planète Mars : un premier aller-retour

entry.content:
Le premier voyage aller-retour vers Mars a débuté ce jeudi 30 juillet avec le décollage de la sonde américano-européenne Perseverance. Ce rover va à nouveau explorer la surface de la planète rouge à la recherche de traces de vie, mais cette fois, les scientifiques ont prévu d’analyser les échantillons en les ramenant sur terre.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le premier voyage aller-retour vers Mars a débuté ce jeudi 30 juillet avec le décollage de la sonde américano-européenne Perseverance. Ce rover va à nouveau explorer la surface de la planète rouge à la recherche de traces de vie, mais cette fois, les scientifiques ont prévu d’analyser les échantillons en les ramenant sur terre. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Opération Tabaski - La DER implante la première Bergerie connectée du Sénégal

link.title: Opération Tabaski - La DER implante la première Bergerie connectée du Sénégal

entry.content: Dans le cadre de son programme de soutien aux entrepreneurs et Open Innovation, la DER a lancé l’opération Tabaski à travers le projet  « GUEET DER » qui est une  foire digitale permettant aux entrepreneur de vendre leurs moutons en cette période de Tabaski.
entry.summary: Dans le cadre de son programme de soutien aux entrepreneurs et Open Innovation, la DER a lancé l’opération Tabaski à travers le projet « GUEET DER » qui est une foire digitale permettant aux entrepreneur de vendre leurs moutons en cette période de Tabaski.

entry.title: Maharastra Tiger travelled 330 km to Kali Forest

link.title: Maharastra Tiger travelled 330 km to Kali Forest

entry.content:
மகாராஷ்டிராவை சேர்ந்த புலி ஒன்று 300 கிமீ நடந்தே கர்நாடகா வரை வந்து இருக்கிறது. பல காடுகள், மலைகள் தாண்டி இந்த புலி பயணம் மேற்கொண்டுள்ளது.
A tiger from Maharashtra travelled 300 km by foot to reach Kali forest in Karnataka in less than 2 years.
entry.summary: மகாராஷ்டிராவை சேர்ந்த புலி ஒன்று 300 கிமீ நடந்தே கர்நாடகா வரை வந்து இருக்கிறது. பல காடுகள், மலைகள் தாண்டி இந்த புலி பயணம் மேற்கொண்டுள்ளது. A tiger from Maharashtra travelled 300 km by foot to reach Kali forest in Karnataka in less than 2 years.

entry.title: Les masques faciaux contrecarrent la technologie de reconnaissance faciale

link.title: Les masques faciaux contrecarrent la technologie de reconnaissance faciale

entry.content:
Face à la pandémie du Covid-19, le port de masques est devenu une norme nécessaire pour éviter la propagation.
Ils présentent néanmoins quelques inconvénients, notamment par rapport à la reconnaissance faciale.
Pour certains algorithmes, les taux d’erreur ont augmenté entre 5% et 50%. 
À titre de comparaison, le taux d’erreur normal de ce type de technologie est de 0,3%. 
Les chercheurs sont déjà en train de réfléchir à des solution pour améliorer les algorithmes.
De nouveaux algorithmes développés avec des visages masqués devraient bientôt arriver.
entry.summary: Face à la pandémie du Covid-19, le port de masques est devenu une norme nécessaire pour éviter la propagation. Ils présentent néanmoins quelques inconvénients, notamment par rapport à la reconnaissance faciale. Pour certains algorithmes, les taux d’erreur ont augmenté entre 5% et 50%. À titre de comparaison, le taux d’erreur normal de ce type de technologie est de 0,3%. Les chercheurs sont déjà en train de réfléchir à des solution pour améliorer les algorithmes. De nouveaux algorithmes développés avec des visages masqués devraient bientôt arriver.

entry.title: Fret ferroviaire: Jean Castex annonce ‘la gratuité des péages jusqu’à la fin 2020 et une division par 2 en 2021’

link.title: Fret ferroviaire: Jean Castex annonce ‘la gratuité des péages jusqu’à la fin 2020 et une division par 2 en 2021’

entry.content: Le Premier ministre Jean Castex était en visite à Bonneuil-sur-Marne ce lundi. Une visite pour parler de l’écologie et des transports. Il a annoncé  "la gratuité des péages jusqu’à la fin 2020 et une division par 2 en 2021".
entry.summary: Le Premier ministre Jean Castex était en visite à Bonneuil-sur-Marne ce lundi. Une visite pour parler de l’écologie et des transports. Il a annoncé "la gratuité des péages jusqu’à la fin 2020 et une division par 2 en 2021".

entry.title: Migranti, stretta di Conte sugli sbarchi a Lampedusa: ‘Non possiamo tollerarlo’

link.title: Migranti, stretta di Conte sugli sbarchi a Lampedusa: ‘Non possiamo tollerarlo’

entry.content: "Mantenete un atteggiamento responsabile. E voglio anche dire una cosa ai giovani". L’intervento del premier Giuseppe Conte a Cerignola
entry.summary: "Mantenete un atteggiamento responsabile. E voglio anche dire una cosa ai giovani". L’intervento del premier Giuseppe Conte a Cerignola

entry.title: Amar Singh Died : अमर सिंह को Amitabh Bachchan ने दी श्रद्धांजलि, शेयर की तस्वीर वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Amar Singh Died : अमर सिंह को Amitabh Bachchan ने दी श्रद्धांजलि, शेयर की तस्वीर वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Amar Singh, a Rajya Sabha member and former Samajwadi Party leader, died on Saturday at the age of 64. He was ill for a long time and was undergoing treatment at a hospital in Singapore. After the death of Amir Singh, tribute is being paid to him from all sides. Amitabh Bachchan, who was once close to Amar Singh, has also paid tribute to Amar Singh in his style. Amitabh has shared a picture on social media. Although he has not written anything with it. But users feel that this post is for Amar Singh, bowing Amitabh’s head.
राज्य सभा सदस्य और समाजवादी पार्टी के पूर्व नेता अमर सिंह का शनिवार को 64 वर्ष की आयु में निधन हो गया. वो लंबे समय से बीमार थे और सिंगापुर के एक अस्पताल में उनका इलाज चल रहा था. अमिर सिंह के निधन के बाद उन्हें हर तरफ से श्रद्धांजलि दी जा रही हैं. एक जमाने में अमर सिंह के करीबी रहे अमिताभ बच्चन ने भी अपने अंदाज में अमर सिंह को श्रद्धांजलि दी है. अमिताभ ने सोशल मीडिया पर एक तस्वीर शेयर की है. हालांकि उन्होंने इसके साथ कुछ लिखा नहीं है. लेकिन यूजर्स को लग रहा है अमिताभ का सिर झुकाए हुए ये पोस्ट अमर सिंह के लिए ही है.
#AmarSinghDied #AmitabhBachchan
entry.summary: Amar Singh, a Rajya Sabha member and former Samajwadi Party leader, died on Saturday at the age of 64. He was ill for a long time and was undergoing treatment at a hospital in Singapore. After the death of Amir Singh, tribute is being paid to him from all sides. Amitabh Bachchan, who was once close to Amar Singh, has also paid tribute to Amar Singh in his style. Amitabh has shared a picture on social media. Although he has not written anything with it. But users feel that this post is for Amar Singh, bowing Amitabh’s head. राज्य सभा सदस्य और समाजवादी पार्टी के पूर्व नेता अमर सिंह का शनिवार को 64 वर्ष की आयु में निधन हो गया. वो लंबे समय से बीमार थे और सिंगापुर के एक अस्पताल में उनका इलाज चल रहा था. अमिर सिंह के निधन के बाद उन्हें हर तरफ से श्रद्धांजलि दी जा रही हैं. एक जमाने में अमर सिंह के करीबी रहे अमिताभ बच्चन ने भी अपने अंदाज में अमर सिंह को श्रद्धांजलि दी है. अमिताभ ने सोशल मीडिया पर एक तस्वीर शेयर की है. हालांकि उन्होंने इसके साथ कुछ लिखा नहीं है. लेकिन यूजर्स को लग रहा है अमिताभ का सिर झुकाए हुए ये पोस्ट अमर सिंह के लिए ही है. #AmarSinghDied #AmitabhBachchan

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput Case: मुंबई पहुंचे पटना SP को जबरन किया क्वारंटाइन, CM बोले ये वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput Case: मुंबई पहुंचे पटना SP को जबरन किया क्वारंटाइन, CM बोले ये वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Bihar Police officers who went to investigate the Sushant Singh Rajput case are finding it very difficult to collect clues. The reason for this is that the Mumbai Police is not cooperating that way. Meanwhile, there is news that Patna city SP Vinay Tiwari, who arrived in Mumbai to investigate the case of the death of late Bollywood actor Sushant Singh Rajput, has been quarantined.
सुशांत सिंह राजपूत केस की जांच करने गए बिहार पुलिस के अधिकारियों के लिए सुराग इकट्ठा करना काफी मुश्किल हो रहा है।इसकी वजह बताई जा रही है कि मुंबई पुलिस उस तरह से सहयोग नहीं कर रही है। इस बीच खबर है कि बॉलीवुड के दिवंगत अभिनेता सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत के मामले की जांच करने के लिए मुंबई पहुंचे पटना के सिटी एसपी विनय तिवारी को क्वारंटाइन कर दिया गया है।
#SushantSinghRajputCase #SushantSinghRajput #MumbaiSP
entry.summary: Bihar Police officers who went to investigate the Sushant Singh Rajput case are finding it very difficult to collect clues. The reason for this is that the Mumbai Police is not cooperating that way. Meanwhile, there is news that Patna city SP Vinay Tiwari, who arrived in Mumbai to investigate the case of the death of late Bollywood actor Sushant Singh Rajput, has been quarantined. सुशांत सिंह राजपूत केस की जांच करने गए बिहार पुलिस के अधिकारियों के लिए सुराग इकट्ठा करना काफी मुश्किल हो रहा है।इसकी वजह बताई जा रही है कि मुंबई पुलिस उस तरह से सहयोग नहीं कर रही है। इस बीच खबर है कि बॉलीवुड के दिवंगत अभिनेता सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत के मामले की जांच करने के लिए मुंबई पहुंचे पटना के सिटी एसपी विनय तिवारी को क्वारंटाइन कर दिया गया है। #SushantSinghRajputCase #SushantSinghRajput #MumbaiSP

entry.title: Pokemon Sword & Shield Episode 30 English Subbed ‘The Reluctant Pikachu and the Exasperated Barrierd’

link.title: Pokemon Sword & Shield Episode 30 English Subbed ‘The Reluctant Pikachu and the Exasperated Barrierd’

entry.content:
When Ash seems fixated on training Riolu, Pikachu, feeling left out and jealous, decides to run away back to Kanto Town. Mr. Mine chases after it, but Pikachu won’t listen, so Mr. Mine determinedly follows Pikachu. This begins a journey in which not only are memories revived and re-experienced, but also both new and old bonds are formed and re-formed.
Pokemon sword and shield episode 30
pokemon sword and shield
pokemon sword and shield
pokemon journeys
English subbed
entry.summary: When Ash seems fixated on training Riolu, Pikachu, feeling left out and jealous, decides to run away back to Kanto Town. Mr. Mine chases after it, but Pikachu won’t listen, so Mr. Mine determinedly follows Pikachu. This begins a journey in which not only are memories revived and re-experienced, but also both new and old bonds are formed and re-formed. Pokemon sword and shield episode 30 pokemon sword and shield pokemon sword and shield pokemon journeys English subbed

entry.title: Exclusive: REELZ Examines Larry Hagman’s Final Days, His Sudden Death

link.title: Exclusive: REELZ Examines Larry Hagman’s Final Days, His Sudden Death

entry.content:
The veteran TV actor TELEVISION ICON AND ‘DALLAS’ STAR LARRY HAGMAN DIES AT 81
“J.R. Ewing, the ‘Man they Loved to Hate,’ he was king of the world,” says Linda Gray who played Hagman’s wife, Sue Ellen Ewing, on the soap.
However, beneath the conservative TV image of the Texas oil baron, was a free-spirited person who loved on and off set indulgence.
“He would wear his court-jester hat… Every day that you went there was a party,” remembers Sheree J. Wilson who played “April Stevens Ewing” in the long-running series.
But it wasn’t just a regular party — Hagman’s habit of indulging had him consuming large amounts of alcohol.
He admitted in an interview with Today that he would drink up to five bottles of champagne a day on the sets while maintaining that he never got drunk.
REELZ RE-EXAMINES ROBIN WILLIAMS’ ‘FINAL DAYS IN AUTOPSY: THE LAST HOURS OF’
But it all took a toll on his body, and he fell ill. The veteran actor had to undergo a liver transplant in 1995, which added nearly two decades to his life. He even gladly showed his surgery scar at his public appearances to his fans.
“He was going to use every ounce of life he had,” says Larry’s Daughter, Kristina Hagman.
However, almost two decades later, he was struck with another illness while filming the Dallas reboot in 2012, and this time it was serious.
Larry was diagnosed with acute myeloid leukemia and died shortly after.
The survival rate can be five years. So what was going in Larry’s body that caused him to develop the disease and die so suddenly,” asks Autopsy’s series expert, Dr. Michael Hunter.
The questions remained: was it his long-battle with alcoholism that lead to the fatal disease?
Tune-in to Autopsy: The Last Hours of… Larry Hagman, Sunday, August 2nd at 9 ET / PT on REELZ for all the details!
entry.summary: The veteran TV actor TELEVISION ICON AND ‘DALLAS’ STAR LARRY HAGMAN DIES AT 81 “J.R. Ewing, the ‘Man they Loved to Hate,’ he was king of the world,” says Linda Gray who played Hagman’s wife, Sue Ellen Ewing, on the soap. However, beneath the conservative TV image of the Texas oil baron, was a free-spirited person who loved on and off set indulgence. “He would wear his court-jester hat… Every day that you went there was a party,” remembers Sheree J. Wilson who played “April Stevens Ewing” in the long-running series. But it wasn’t just a regular party — Hagman’s habit of indulging had him consuming large amounts of alcohol. He admitted in an interview with Today that he would drink up to five bottles of champagne a day on the sets while maintaining that he never got drunk. REELZ RE-EXAMINES ROBIN WILLIAMS’ ‘FINAL DAYS IN AUTOPSY: THE LAST HOURS OF’ But it all took a toll on his body, and he fell ill. The veteran actor had to undergo a liver transplant in 1995, which added nearly two decades to his life. He even gladly showed his surgery scar at his public appearances to his fans. “He was going to use every ounce of life he had,” says Larry’s Daughter, Kristina Hagman. However, almost two decades later, he was struck with another illness while filming the Dallas reboot in 2012, and this time it was serious. Larry was diagnosed with acute myeloid leukemia and died shortly after. The survival rate can be five years. So what was going in Larry’s body that caused him to develop the disease and die so suddenly,” asks Autopsy’s series expert, Dr. Michael Hunter. The questions remained: was it his long-battle with alcoholism that lead to the fatal disease? Tune-in to Autopsy: The Last Hours of… Larry Hagman, Sunday, August 2nd at 9 ET / PT on REELZ for all the details!
